title: 小红书 content strategy and first posts
description: Complete 小红书 marketing strategy with content pillars, 4-week calendar, AI voiceover tool research, and 6 ready-to-use post drafts.

scope.in: Platform research, AI voiceover tool comparison, content strategy doc, 4-week calendar, 6 post scripts/outlines
scope.out: Actual video recording/editing, account setup, posting

dod.criterion: Strategy document with 3 content pillars, 4-week calendar (12 slots), measurement framework
AI voiceover tool comparison with 4+ tools evaluated
6 post drafts with hooks, body, CTA, and hashtags
Chinese content guidance with tone, key terms, and 10+ hashtags

tasks.title: Research xiaohongshu platform mechanics and AI voiceover tools
tasks.user_scenario: The marketing team understands xiaohongshu's algorithm, content format constraints, and available AI voiceover tools.
tasks.scope: Research xiaohongshu content format specs, algorithm signals, developer/tech content examples. Compare AI voiceover tools: HeyGen, ElevenLabs, Speechify, Azure TTS, Volcengine TTS for Chinese voice quality, pricing, API access.

dod.criterion: Research document covers xiaohongshu format constraints with specific numbers (max images, video length, caption length)
At least 4 AI voiceover tools compared in table with: name, Chinese voice quality, pricing, API availability, recommendation
At least 3 examples of successful developer/tech content on xiaohongshu cited
Screencast recording guide covers: recommended tools, resolution, aspect ratio for xiaohongshu

tasks.title: Write content strategy with pillars, calendar, and measurement framework
tasks.user_scenario: CEO has a single document defining what to post, when, and how to measure success over 90 days.
tasks.scope: Content pillars: AI agents running a company, pixel-art visualization, developer productivity. 4-week calendar with 3x/week. Measurement framework at 30/60/90 days. Chinese content writing guidance.

dod.criterion: Strategy document has 3 content pillars with descriptions and example topics
4-week calendar grid has 12 slots each with pillar, format, topic, and hook
Measurement framework defines specific numeric targets at 30, 60, and 90 days
Chinese content guidance covers tone, key terms in Chinese, and 10+ recommended hashtags

tasks.title: Draft scripts and outlines for the first 6 posts
tasks.user_scenario: Team can start producing content immediately with detailed scripts, not just topics.
tasks.scope: Write 6 detailed post outlines/scripts. Screencast posts get scene-by-scene voiceover scripts in Chinese. Image carousel posts get slide-by-slide content. Each post: hook, body, CTA, hashtags.

dod.criterion: 6 post drafts exist, each with hook line, body, CTA, and hashtag list
At least 2 posts are screencast format with scene-by-scene voiceover scripts including Chinese text
At least 2 posts feature the pixel-art office visualization as primary visual
Posts cover at least 2 of the 3 content pillars
